calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Aug-17-2022 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar May-25-2022 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar May-25-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. There being no objections and the matter being properly noticed, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated April 27, 2013 is admitted to probate. Richard William Childress is appointed as the Executor with limited authority. Bond in the amount of $20,000.00 is required. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for May 25, 2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Amy Harrington is appointed Probate Referee. If a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is filed two weeks prior, the status hearing will go off calendar.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.
